texto: It is incredible what a pronounced hero can get away with and what can be accredited to him. There were no inconvenient questions asked of Robin because everyone preferred to believe that heroes defeat villains and that there were distinguishable traits that could easily tell the two apart.
explicacao: Citação de Arianna Alexsandra Collins sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is incredible what a pronounced hero can get away with and what can be accredited to him. Ther…” articula reflexao, hero-worship, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como history.
